home.heroTagline: I lead operations and build security tools. Sometimes both at once.
home.featuredSubtitle: Tools and platforms I've built from the ground up.
home.aboutText: I'm Head of Ops at Ciao Elsa, where I keep a pension-fund brokerage running smoothly. Outside work, I build things: VulnClaw (AI-driven penetration testing) and Trova (a SaaS boilerplate so good I use it myself).
home.freebieTitle: Free: The AI Ops Security Playbook
home.freebieDesc: 5 strategies I use to keep operations secure without slowing innovation. No fluff, just tactics.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Tools I've built because the existing ones weren't good enough.

vulnclaw.title: VulnClaw
vulnclaw.subtitle: AI-Driven Penetration Testing CLI
vulnclaw.description: An intelligent CLI agent that automates security assessments. AI-powered reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, and exploitation — all from your terminal.

trova.title: Trova
trova.subtitle: SaaS Boilerplate That Ships
trova.description: Next.js 16, Tailwind v4, Better Auth, Drizzle ORM, i18n, Resend emails, Stripe, shadcn/ui. Everything you need to launch a SaaS in days, not weeks.

trova.title: Trova
trova.tagline: The SaaS boilerplate that actually ships.
trova.description: Stop rebuilding auth, emails, billing, and i18n for every project. Trova gives you a production-ready foundation so you can focus on what makes your SaaS unique.

features.auth: Better Auth – magic links, OAuth (Google, GitHub), 2FA, session management
features.email: Resend + React Email – beautiful transactional emails, 5 templates included
features.i18n: next-intl – English and Italian out of the box, easy to extend
features.billing: Stripe – subscription plans, webhooks, customer portal
features.ui: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 – dark mode, responsive, customizable

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: One price. Everything included.
pricing.includes: Full source code, lifetime updates, priority support

freebie.description: After years running ops at a fintech-adjacent company while building security tools in my spare time, I've learned what actually works. This playbook distills the tactics I use daily.
whatsInside: How to build a security culture without fear
The toolchain I actually use (open source)

form.success: Check your inbox! The playbook is on its way.

about.title: About Riccardo
about.subtitle: Operations leader. Tool builder. Automation obsessive.
about.intro: I'm Head of Ops at Ciao Elsa, a pension-fund brokerage and partner of Allianz. My job is to keep the machine running while making sure we're ready for tomorrow.
story: I started in operations because I couldn't stand inefficiency. Over the years, I realized the best way to fix broken processes was to build the tools myself. That's how VulnClaw and Trova were born.
Today I split my time between leading operations at a fintech-adjacent company and building open-core security tools. I believe the best operators are also builders.
When I'm not working, you'll find me experimenting with new tech, contributing to open source, or planning my next build.
about.philosophy: My philosophy? Build the tool you wish existed. If it helps you, it'll help someone else.
